leaders.r: 45th and 47th President of the United States
tags: Transactional nationalism
No defined exit condition
War ends when I feel it in my bones
leaders.ideo: Transactional nationalism ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” no consistent ideological doctrine. Blind spot: underestimates adversary resilience and cost of conflict.

narcissism.evidence: Peer-reviewed Frontiers in Psychology 2025. Six named former Cabinet officials on record (Mattis, McMaster, Kelly, Esper, Milley, Woodward sources). Congressional testimony corroborating pattern. Consistent 8-year documented behaviour.
narcissism.source: Frontiers in Psychology PMC 2025; Woodward War 2024; Gen Kelly NYT Oct 2024

impulsivity.evidence: Syria withdrawal announced via tweet before Pentagon notified ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” Mattis resigned same day Dec 2018. Afghanistan troop reduction against written SecDef and Joint Chiefs memorandum ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” Congressional testimony Sept 2021. Iran war exit condition: when I feel it in my bones ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” public statement 2026.
impulsivity.source: Congressional testimony Sept 2021; Mattis resignation letter Dec 2018; NBC News 2026

values.evidence: No consistent ethical framework documented. Reversed NATO, Russia, China, Iran positions within single terms based on transactional interest. No reform agenda beyond serving financial allies. Framework is personal supremacy ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” stated "I alone can fix it."
values.source: Foreign Policy analysis; documented policy reversals; Woodward Rage 2020

survival.evidence: 91 felony counts across 4 indictments ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” all impacted by return to office. War framing provides political cover and approval. Survival incentive tied to political not physical survival.

accountability.evidence: Active dismantlement of press freedom + accountability mechanisms. Don Lemon arrested Jan 29 2026 covering protest. FBI raided WaPo journalist home Jan 14 2026. ICE detained journalist Estefany Rodriguez March 2026, surrounded by trucks. Sami Hamdi detained SFO Oct 2025, visa revoked day before. Mario Guevara: 110 days detention, deported. AP banned from White House Feb 2025. Jimmy Kimmel pulled from air Sept 2025 after FCC pressure ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” ABC complied. CBS pulled CECOT report 3 hours before broadcast. Paramount paid $16M to Trump to settle lawsuit while needing merger approval ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” regulatory leverage used to silence media. Pentagon press oath Sept 2025 ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” entire pool walked out. RSF designated "press freedom predator." 76 documented federal actions against journalists (Poynter). 32 arrests + 170 assaults on journalists in 2025. VOA, Radio Free Europe gutted ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” 427M people lost access. FCC opened investigation into Senate candidate for appearing on The View. CISA gutted. War Powers bypassed. Active dismantlement not inherited gap.
accountability.source: RSF Jan 2026; Poynter Jan 2026; CPJ; CJR 2025; Freedom of Press Foundation; Axios Feb 2026; Wikipedia documented record

leaders.ideo: Revisionist Zionism. Blind spot: conflict continuation is structurally necessary for personal legal immunity. Strategic and personal incentives have merged.

narcissism.evidence: Trial testimony described self as victim of politically orchestrated witch hunt despite three independent indictments. Requested pardon from President Herzog Nov 2025 without admitting guilt ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” no precedent in Israeli law. Coalition includes Ben-Gvir convicted terrorist supporter.
narcissism.source: Jerusalem District Court records; Reuters Dec 2025

impulsivity.evidence: Strategic rather than impulsive. Long-term calculated manoeuvring documented across 30 years. South Pars strike was calculated not impulsive ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” coordinated with US per Axios AP WSJ.
impulsivity.source: Axios AP WSJ 2026; academic biography sources

values.evidence: Coalition includes Ben-Gvir convicted terrorist supporter and Smotrich who denies Palestinian peoplehood. Oslo Accords systematically undermined. Settlement expansion against own stated two-state framework. No domestic reform delivered outside security apparatus. Values framework is Revisionist Zionism as personal survival vehicle.
values.source: HRW; Jerusalem District Court; Oslo Accords record; settlement data

survival.evidence: Case 1000 fraud and breach of trust ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” gifts worth 200,000 USD. Case 2000 fraud and breach of trust ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” media coverage deal. Case 4000 bribery fraud ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” regulatory favours to Bezeq worth approx 500M USD. Trial begun May 2020 suspended under wartime emergency provisions. Direct structural link between war continuation and trial suspension.
survival.source: Jerusalem District Court; Al-Monitor Dec 2025; public record

accountability.evidence: Actively lobbied to restructure Israeli judiciary 2023 to reduce executive oversight ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” triggered mass protests. Governing under criminal indictment by circumventing resignation norms. Wartime emergency suspended own corruption trials. Deliberate exploitation of legal gaps.
accountability.source: Jerusalem District Court; Israeli judicial reform protests 2023; Al-Monitor

narcissism.evidence: Ritz Carlton mass arrests 2017 ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” 200+ princes and businessmen held without charge. Allegedly sent bullet to judge who ruled against him ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” documented by Sir John Jenkins former British Ambassador. Pattern of eliminating rivals through state apparatus.

Khashoggi murder ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” bone saw in own consulate ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” shows risk tolerance when personally threatened.

values.evidence: Vision 2030 contains genuine economic diversification ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” non-trivial. Women allowed to drive, entertainment sector created. However: activist who campaigned for right to drive was imprisoned after it was granted. Reform as performance and reputation management, not principle. survival.evidence: Physical survival not immediately threatened. Political survival tied to Vision 2030 economic success ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” now threatened by war he helped start. No democratic accountability mechanism.

accountability.source: DNI Haines Feb 2021; HRW; Amnesty International

leaders.r: Supreme Leader of the Islamic Republic of Iran
tags: No Grand Ayatollah credentials
IRGC-dependent for all power
First statement vowed no surrender and Strait remains closed
leaders.ideo: Velayat-e Faqih combined with anti-imperial resistance ideology. Constitutionally elected per Assembly of Experts process. Blind spot: legitimacy deficit means every moderate signal costs internal credibility ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” structurally pushed toward hardline positions. Cannot negotiate without appearing to surrender the framework that justifies his power.

narcissism.evidence: Limited public record as new Supreme Leader. First statement showed grandiose resistance framing. IRGC-dependent which creates feedback loop reinforcing hardline self-image. Constitutionally elected per Assembly of Experts process though lacking traditional clerical legitimacy.
narcissism.source: Iranian state media; academic Iran affairs literature

impulsivity.evidence: Very limited track record. New leader mid-war. Legitimacy deficit may drive impulsive signalling to demonstrate strength. Insufficient public record for higher confidence.
impulsivity.source: Limited public record ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” new leader

values.evidence: Limited track record. Velayat-e Faqih framework documented. First public statements hardline resistance ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” no reform signals. Insufficient evidence to score lower given short tenure. No reform agenda visible.
values.source: Iranian state media; IRGC institutional record; limited personal documentation

survival.evidence: No legitimate alternative power base outside IRGC patronage network. If IRGC fractures, position collapses. Wartime context means survival depends on war not ending in visible defeat. Every moderate signal threatens internal credibility.
survival.source: Iranian political analysis; academic sources on IRGC structure

accountability.evidence: Inherited IRGC-controlled system ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” did not personally dismantle checks. Limited track record. No documented personal circumvention of accountability mechanisms distinct from institutional structure he operates within. Score reflects inherited system not personal dismantlement.
accountability.source: Iranian constitutional structure; limited personal record as new leader

leaders.ideo: Hindu nationalist framework rooted in RSS ideology. Blind spot: traumatic nationalism requires permanent Muslim enemy ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” makes genuine Pakistan de-escalation politically impossible.

narcissism.evidence: Clinical psychologist Ashis Nandy 2002 assessment: met virtually all criteria for authoritarian personality. Self-referential statements ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” refers to self in third person documented. BBC documentary banned within 24 hours of Indian university screenings.

values.source: GST implementation record; CAA documentation; HRW; World Bank development data

survival.evidence: BJP lost outright majority in 2024 ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” now dependent on coalition partners Nitish Kumar and Chandrababu Naidu. LoC violations create domestic pressure to respond visibly. Coalition survival requires maintaining nationalist base. Updated from 55 following LoC violations.

accountability.evidence: Mixed record. Election commission functioned ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” BJP lost seats 2024, not dismantled. Supreme Court still operates. leaders.ideo: Pakistan military institutional nationalism. Non-interference doctrine for internal politics but actively shapes civilian governance. Blind spot: emboldened by May 2025 aerial success ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” may overestimate Pakistan capacity for sustained multi-front conflict.

narcissism.evidence: Institutional rather than individual narcissism. Pakistani military's documented pattern of viewing itself as guardian of national interest above civilian authority. Munir personal profile shows assertive command style but limited direct documentation.

impulsivity.evidence: LoC violations conducted while simultaneously fighting on two other active fronts ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” Afghanistan border and Balochistan. Three simultaneous active engagements documented operational fact. Post-Rafale-downing emboldening shifts risk threshold upward. Updated from 65 following documented LoC violations.

Pursuing three simultaneous military fronts with economy at IMF threshold ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” no political solution orientation. Framework is institution preservation not national interest.

accountability.evidence: Active and systematic dismantlement of judiciary and press simultaneously. 26th Amendment degraded judicial independence. 27th Amendment Nov 2025 gave Munir command of all armed forces + lifelong immunity ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” constitutional lawyers called it "death knell of independent judiciary" and "what previous dictators could only dream of" (CNN). Ahmad Noorani investigation published March 2025: brothers abducted next day, disappeared one month, family blacklisted, bank accounts frozen. 4 exiled journalists sentenced to life in absentia Jan 2026 (CPJ). 27 YouTube channels blocked July 2025. RSF rank 158/180 lowest in years. 2024 election ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” PTI symbol stripped, media blackout on PTI, candidates pressured to withdraw. X blocked Feb 2024. Pakistan testing China-like surveillance firewall (Al Jazeera, Amnesty International). Band A: RSF, CPJ, Freedom House, CNN, Amnesty all documenting same pattern.
accountability.source: CNN Nov 2025; RSF 2025; CPJ Jan 2026; Freedom House 2025; Amnesty International Sept 2025; Al Jazeera Nov 2024; JURIST May 2025

values.source: Documented refusal of exit deals; Kyiv Feb 2022; NABU cases; documented silence on Gaza

survival.evidence: Literal physical survival ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” remained in Kyiv during active invasion. Democratic elections suspended under martial law. Western aid dependency creates vulnerability. Gaza-Iran silence is documented survival calculus ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” cannot afford to alienate Israel which has Washington influence.

accountability.evidence: NABU preserved and functioning as independent body. EU anti-corruption conditionality accepted. However elections suspended under martial law (constitutionally authorised). Defence Ministry corruption persists ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” systemic not addressed. Not active dismantlement but incomplete maintenance under extreme conditions.
accountability.source: NABU documented cases; EU accession conditions; Ukrainian constitutional provisions

narcissism.evidence: Peer-reviewed Springer 2024 chapter on Erdogan psychological profile. Turkish Studies academic journal 2011 personality and leadership assessment. values.evidence: Early AKP tenure delivered genuine democratic and economic reforms ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” EU accession progress, civilian oversight of military, economic growth 2002-2013. Framework shifted fundamentally post-2013 Gezi and post-2016 coup. Reform abandoned when it threatened personal power. Current framework is Islamist nationalism as political survival tool ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” not principled.
values.source: AKP early reform record; EU progress reports 2002-2013; post-2016 documented shift; RSF

survival.evidence: March 2024 local elections: AKP lost Istanbul and Ankara ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” first major electoral defeat. Imamoglu prosecution documented as political persecution to remove 2028 rival. Political survival now entangled with suppressing opposition.
survival.source: 2024 Turkish election results public record; Imamoglu prosecution documented

accountability.evidence: Turkey had functioning independent courts, free press, Kurdish political representation ГѓВѓГ‚ВўГѓВ‚Г‚ВЂГѓВ‚Г‚В” all actively dismantled. 150,000 dismissed after 2016 without due process. Constitutional court independence reduced. Imamoglu prosecuted to eliminate electoral rival. Clear active dismantlement of previously functioning institutions.
accountability.source: RSF 2024; documented post-coup dismissals; constitutional amendments; Imamoglu case

meta.methodology: Four-step scoring: Evidence Band (A=76-100, B=51-75, C=26-50, D=0-25) + Intensity Multiplier (frequency 0-8 + consequence 0-8 + corroboration 0-8). Dimension weights: survival 25%, accountability 22%, narcissism 20%, impulsivity 18%, values 15%.
